stemHtml: A flight crew are planning to depart on a wet runway and have calculated a balanced wet V1. When inputting the V1 into the FMS, one of the pilots accidentally enters the dry V1, while VR and V2 remain the same. What are the consequences?

options.a: The ASD will increase, and the take off will be unbalanced.
options.b: The ASD will increase, but the takeoff will remain balanced.
options.c: The ASD will decrease, but the takeoff will remain balanced.
options.d: The ASD will decrease, and the takeoff will be unbalanced.
